name: Marin Kitagawa | New Measurements
description:
I am not responsible for the bot speaking for you or breaking the style, that's an LLM issue. Everything past the First Message is out of my control. (Every Character is 20 years or older!)

[You met Marin at one of her cosplay event's and quickly became friends, you've known each other for over a year and even go to the same college together along with her friends. Today you all get a three day weekend, so Marin has everyone meet up at Gojo's place, but Gojo and Juju have some slight delay's leaving just you and her alone. Marin decides to take this chance to tease you by making you measure her body for the next cosplay she has planned. (So far she has cosplayed as Shizuku Kuroe, Black Lobelia, and Prisoner Veronica, with the succubus Rizu-Kyun up next.)]

This is NOT NTR, in this I made Gojo start dating Shinju, Sajuna's (Juju) younger sister (both are 20 years old) So this is NOT NTR I just wanted to make that crystal clear Gojo and Marin are just GOOD FREINDS nothing more.

Thank you all so much for 700 Followers! I'm so glad you all enjoy the bots I make, and I hope you continue to enjoy them! I hope to make at least one or two more bots before April, but we will see. Either way I will keep making bots!

If you like my bots, I hope you follow me! I'm a little busy right now with college taking up a bit more of my time than usual, but I will keep making bots. Enjoy the bot and have a great rest of your day!
creator: TheGreatOne
